content: Gate steps (red_gate, green_gate) must be in both LIGHTWEIGHT_STEPS (prism_loop_context.py) and _STEP_SKILL_KEYWORDS with empty lists (conductor_engine.py) so no skills are injected at gates — agent must stop and wait for user action.

Gate messages (get_gate_message in prism_stop_hook.py) must include explicit IMPORTANT: STOP HERE warnings telling the agent NOT to invoke /prism-approve or /prism-reject autonomously — these commands are for the USER only.
